case_title: JOK LAU TSANG VS. DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT MCNEMAR, VERNON
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE **$53.73** FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG
DECLARATION OF EDWIN WONG IN SUPPORT OF EX PARTE APPLICATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG
ORDER GRANTING PLAINTIFF'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $150.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG

1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG AS TO DEFENDANT MCNEMAR, VERNON DOES 2-10 INCLUSIVE

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ENTERING JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MCNEMAR, VERNON

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSANG, JOK LAU TRUSTEE OF THE JOK LAU TSANG  REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 05/22/2012 BY HER ATTORNEY IN FACT WALCHEONG NG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCNEMAR, VERNON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 522 LAWTON STREET, SAN FRANCSICO, CA 94122 $1,934.28 RENT, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,159.28, SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MCNEMAR, VERNON
